calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Leo M. LaRocca, Esq. appeared for Claren Angelo Herbert, Successor Trustee of the Cesarina Maria Herbert Trust.
No appearance by defendant Bay Area Builders Hardare, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on April 9, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 12, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed August 11, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Angelo Herbert, Successor Trustee of the Cesarina Maria Herbert Trust, and against the Defaulted Defendant Bay Area Builders Hardware, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,688.42.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $1,125.00.
Costs - $386.42, for a total judgment in the amount of $5,199.84.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
